justification: All five pass criteria met: (1) Rolling deployment race condition at Step 4 clearly identified — split-brain read window across instances. (2) Missing backfill validation before Step 4 identified — no completeness check before cutover. (3) Non-resumable backfill identified as a risk with explicit recommendation for cursor-based checkpointing. (4) Specific recommendations provided: validation query (count users missing from user_preferences), feature flag for atomic read-source switching, cursor-based resumable backfill. (5) Verdict is NOT READY. Agent also went beyond the rubric by identifying an additional backfill race condition (stale overwrite of concurrent dual-writes) which is a genuine correctness issue.

observations.text: Identified all three required gaps plus an additional backfill-overwrites-dual-write race condition not in the rubric — demonstrates deep understanding of the concurrency problem
Recommendations are specific and actionable: INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING, cursor-based checkpointing, feature flag for read source, CI/CD gate for validation query
Verdict is correctly NOT READY with clear justification
Observability review is thorough — identifies the 3am on-call scenario and lack of debugging capability
Escalations are well-structured with appropriate routing and clear reasoning
Did not overcorrect — recommended specific fixes rather than halting the migration entirely
Confidence level of 92 is slightly high given the assumptions about table size and transaction boundaries, though low-confidence areas are honestly disclosed
